segments.text: ANNIE: Oh Ben - I just remembered I never filled in that form for Nick - did you do it?
segments.translation: 安妮：哦本——我才想起来我还没填你可发的表格——你填了吗？

segments.text: BEN: The course feedback form?
segments.translation: 本：课程反馈表？

segments.text: ANNIE: Yes. If you want, we can do it together, I've got mine here.
segments.translation: 安妮：是的。如果你想的话，我们可以一起填。我自己的在这里。

segments.text: BEN: Is that OK?
segments.translation: 本：可以吗？

segments.text: ANNIE: Yeah.
segments.translation: 安妮：当然。

segments.text: BEN: OK, let's have a look then.
segments.translation: 本：好的，让我们来看看吧。

segments.text: What do we have to do?
segments.translation: 我们要做点啥？

segments.text: ANNIE: Let's fill in the top first, let's see, Course, Course code ...
segments.translation: 安妮：我们先把上面的信息填完，让我看看，课程，课程代码……

segments.text: BEN: Er, it's Communication in Business.
segments.translation: 本：呃，是商业通信。

segments.text: ANNIE: OK, Communication ... in ... Business, I do know that, but what's the code?
segments.translation: 安妮：好的，商业……通信。我也知道这个，但是代码是什么？

segments.text: BEN: CBI6 something, CB162, isn't it?
segments.translation: 本：CB16什么的，CB162，对吗？

segments.text: ANNIE: Mmm, that's it, OK and dates, when did we start?
segments.translation: 安妮：嗯，就是这个，好的，日期，我们什么时候开始的？

segments.text: I remember, my birthday's on May 4th and it was the day after, it must have been May 5th.
segments.translation: 我记得我的生日是在5月4日，这个是之后一天，应该是5月5日。

segments.text: BEN: Gosh, doesn't seem that long ago, does it?
segments.translation: 本：天啊，真没觉得有这么久，是不是？

segments.text: ANNIE: No, and we finish at the end of this week, on Friday, so that's July 15th?
segments.translation: 安妮：没觉得。我们在本周末完成，周五，那就是7月15日？

segments.text: BEN: Er 16th, Monday was the 12th.
segments.translation: 本：呃16日，周一是12号。

segments.text: Right, that was the easy bit, now let's have a look - "Please give your comments on the following aspects of the course", OK, what's the first one?
segments.translation: 好的，这部分比较容易，现在我们来看看，“请对于课程以下方面给出你的评价”，好的，第一个是什么？

segments.text: Oh, course organisation.
segments.translation: 哦，课程结构。

segments.text: What do you think?
segments.translation: 你觉得呢？

segments.text: ANNIE: Er, clear? It was, wasn't it?
segments.translation: 安妮：嗯，清晰？的确很清晰，是不是？

segments.text: BEN: Yes, I think the organisation was clear.
segments.translation: 本：是的，我认为结构清晰。

segments.text: OK, anything else for course organisation?
segments.translation: 好的，还有其他有关课程机构的吗？

segments.text: ANNIE: It was a good thing he gave us the course outline at the beginning, in the first session, that was useful, so I'll put that down, shall I?
segments.translation: 安妮：在课程开始他给了我们课程大纲，这点很好，在第一节课这个很有用。所以我要把它记下来，好吗？

segments.text: Now, going on to suggestions for improvement, one thing that wasn't so good, I think we could have done a bit more work at the beginning, I mean at the beginning it seemed dead easy.
segments.translation: 现在，转到提高的建议上，我不太确定的一件事是，我猜我们可以在开始时多做些工作，我的意思是在开始的时候简单死了。

segments.text: BEN: Yeah.
segments.translation: 本：是的。

segments.text: ANNIE: I thought it was going to be really easy and then all of a sudden in the second half of the course we got a whole load of work, reading to do and essays and things.
segments.translation: 安妮：我以为课程会一直这样轻松，但是在下半学期，突然我们一下来了很多工作，很多阅读、论文等等。

segments.text: BEN: Yes, it'd be better if it was more even.
segments.translation: 本：是的，如果能够平均一些就更好了。

segments.text: OK, now course delivery, does that mean teaching?
segments.translation: 好的，课程表达，这个的意思是教学吗？

segments.text: ANNIE: Yeah, I suppose so.
segments.translation: 安妮：是的，我猜是这样。

segments.text: Well, what I thought was really good on this course was the standard of teaching.
segments.translation: 好吧，我觉得这个最好的一点是教学标准。

segments.text: Actually - I mean some of the teachers were better than others - but the standard generally was fine.
segments.translation: 事实上——我的意思是有些老师比其他的好——但是整体的标准是没问题的。

segments.text: Much better than other courses I've been on.
segments.translation: 比我上过的其他课程要好多了。

segments.text: BEN: Yeah, I agree. Let's put that then.
segments.translation: 本：是的，我同意。我们把这个记下来吧。

segments.text: What about suggestions for improvement?
segments.translation: 那提高的建议呢？

segments.text: ANNIE: I ... I didn't think it was all that wonderful when we had great long group discussion sessions that went on for hours and hours.
segments.translation: 安妮：我……我觉得当我们上一个小时又一个小时的小组讨论课的时候，就不是那么美好了。

segments.text: I don't mean we shouldn't have group discussions, just that they shouldn't go on too long.
segments.translation: 我的意思不是我们不需要小组讨论，而是它们不用那么长。

segments.text: ANNIE: Now, on to materials and equipment.
segments.translation: 安妮：现在，来说说材料和设备。

segments.text: BEN: Oh, now what was good about some sessions was the handouts.
segments.translation: 本：哦，好的一点就是有些课上的讲义。

segments.text: ANNIE: Yes, I thought all the handouts were good actually, and some were great, with website addresses and everything.
segments.translation: 安妮：是的，我实际上觉得所有的讲义都很不错，有些简直是棒极了，上面有网站地址和所有信息。

segments.text: BEN: One problem though with materials was the key texts.
segments.translation: 本：这些材料的一个问题就是重点课文。

segments.text: ANNIE: Yes! There just weren't enough copies on reserve in the library.
segments.translation: 安妮：是的！图书管理里库存的份数不够。

segments.text: And if you can't get the key texts before the session, how are you supposed to do the reading?
segments.translation: 如果你课前拿不到重点课文，又该怎么去做阅读呢？

segments.text: And not enough computers.
segments.translation: 还有电脑也不够。

segments.text: You have to wait ages to get one.
segments.translation: 你必须要等很久才能轮上一台。

segments.text: BEN: OK, testing and evaluation - well, I don't know, it's hard to say until we've got our written assignments back.
segments.translation: 本：好的，测试和评估——好吧，我不知道，我们的写作作业拿回来之前都很难讲。

segments.text: ANNIE: Don't talk about it, I only got mine in yesterday, it was a real struggle.
segments.translation: 安妮：别提了，我昨天才交，真是太挣扎了。

segments.text: I hate to think what mark I'll get.
segments.translation: 我讨厌去想我能得几分。

segments.text: BEN: Yes, but at least we've done the oral presentation - I thought that was good, the way I got my feedback really quickly.
segments.translation: 本：是的，但是我们至少已经完成了口头陈述——我觉得这个还不错，我拿到反馈的方式很快。

segments.text: ANNIE: Yes, it was. And I liked the way we knew what we'd be evaluated on, we knew the criteria, so we knew we had to think about clarity, organisation, and so on.
segments.translation: 安妮：是的，的确如此。我还喜欢我们知道我们的哪些方面会被评分，我们知道标准，所以我们知道我们要考虑清晰度、结构等等。

segments.text: BEN: Yeah, but I'm not so sure about the written work.
segments.translation: 本：是的，但我不太确定笔头作业。

segments.text: One thing I think is that there's just too much, it's really stressful.
segments.translation: 我认为一个问题是太多了，压力太大了。

segments.text: ANNIE: Yes, I'd agree and I don't see why they can't let us know the criteria they use for marking.
segments.translation: 安妮：是的，我同意。我没明白他们为什么不让我们知道他们评分的标准。

segments.text: BEN: The written assignments? But he told us.
segments.translation: 本：写作作业吗？但是他告诉我们了。

segments.text: ANNIE:No, for the final exams.
segments.translation: 安妮：期末考试的没有。

segments.text: What are they looking for - what are the criteria?
segments.translation: 他们要看什么——标准是什么？

segments.text: What makes a pass or a fail?
segments.translation: 怎样通过或者不及格？

segments.text: BEN: Yeah, I never thought of that. It'd be really useful.
segments.translation: 本：是的，我都没考虑过这些事。这应该很有用。

segments.text: ANNIE: OK, any other comments?
segments.translation: 安妮：好的，还有其他的评论吗？

segments.text: BEN: I thought student support was excellent.
segments.translation: 本：我认为学生的支持很棒。

segments.text: ANNIE: Yeah, me too. OK, excellent. Other comments?
segments.translation: 安妮：是的，我也这么认为。好的，很棒。还有其他的吗？

segments.text: BEN: No, I can't think of anything else.
segments.translation: 本：没了，我也想不起其他的来了。

segments.text: ANNIE: Nor me. OK, so that's done. Thanks, Ben.
segments.translation: 安妮：我也没有了。好的，那就这些了。谢谢，本。

segments.text: BEN: No, thank you.
segments.translation: 本：不，要谢谢你。
